rolling_bass_spec.rhythm: Triplets (1/8T) or Dotted (1/16.) relative to Kick
rolling_bass_spec.envelope: Strictly Pluck: Attack 0ms, Decay 100ms, Sustain 0%, Release 50ms
rolling_bass_spec.phase_lock: Every bass note starts at 0 degree phase to avoid cancellation
rolling_bass_spec.tonality: Monotonic (One note focus) or Root-Fifth transitions
rolling_bass_spec.rule: Kick-tail and Bass-attack must never coexist in the same 10ms window.
